# Order Tracking

Shipping options include a tracking system for every shipment. Once a carrier scans the parcel, a tracking number is emailed to the customer, who can also access live tracking status via their account's order history page. It's important to note that tracking information may take up to twelve hours to update after the shipping confirmation is received.

[Source: shipping_options.md#order-tracking]
